title: ArtifactRef V1
description: Content-addressed reference to a research artifact. Used by integrity reports, research outcomes, and events to point at specific versioned artifacts.

uri.description: URI of the artifact. Format: 'rep://<run_id>/<artifact_path>' for local, or absolute URI for remote.

kind.description: Artifact kind (e.g., 'strategy', 'outcome', 'computation_result', 'integrity_report'). Optional for forward compatibility.

schema_version.description: Schema version of the referenced artifact.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the artifact content. Used for integrity verification and content addressing.

size_bytes.description: Size of the artifact in bytes.

produced_by.description: Agent or component that produced this artifact.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC Z timestamp of artifact creation.
